name: e-commerce-skill
description: Marketplace seller-store skills for OpenClaw. v0.1 ships a Walmart Marketplace (US) suite: a walmart-seller hub (own-keys auth, condensed API map, account-safety guardrails, runnable Python helpers) plus focused spokes — onboarding/approval, listing creation & optimization, search SEO, WFS fulfillment, Walmart Connect advertising, Buy Box & repricing, Pro Seller badge, Walmart+ customer targeting, fulfillment ops, and product research (finding 爆款). Designed to sit alongside an ERP like DianXiaoMi, not replace it. Built on the research library in ../docs.
author: boshenzh
